tor Class TokenSentEvent java.lang.Object ptolemy.actor.TokenSentEvent public class TokenSentEvent extends java.lang.Object An event that is published by IOPorts whenever broadcast, send or sendInside is called. The appropriate event should be publ

e is called. The appropriate event should be published whenever a token is transfered from one port to another. In Kepler the provenance recorder uses these events to save intermediate results of the workflow. In the future these events could

the workflow. In the future these events could be used for "smart" reruns or a fault tolerance mechanism. Since: Ptolemy II 5.2 Version: $Id: TokenSentEvent.java,v 1.8 2006/04/19 22:24:43 cxh Exp $ Author: Oscar Barney Accepted Rating: Red (barney
